versions.version_description: Includes chords and synth melodies arranged for guitar.
This Tab Is A Simplified Version Of The Song. There Honestly Isn't Much To The Song, Chord-wise, So... Yeah.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
Yeah


[Verse 1]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
I've been tryna call[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
I've been on my own for long enough[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Maybe you can show me how to love,[/tab]

maybe
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm going through withdrawals[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
You don't even have to do too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
You can turn me on with just a touch, baby[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
I look around and[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Sin City's cold and empty (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
I can't see clearly when you're gone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust[/tab]

Hey, hey, hey

[ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm running out of time[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Cause I can see the sun light up the sky[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
So I hit the road in overdrive, baby, oh[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
The city's cold and empty (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (Oh)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
I can't see clearly when you're gone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm just coming back to let you know (Back to let you know)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I could never say it on the phone (Say it on the phone)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Will never let you go this time (Ooh)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]

Hey, hey, hey

Hey, hey, hey


[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
